debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ one_to_one (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A)

proof:
by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm
failed_attempts:
by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply set_ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h; apply set_ext; intro x
  have iff_val : ∀ {Y}, x ∈ Y ↔ x.val ∈ val_image A Y := by
    intro Y; dsimp [val_image]; constructor
    · intro h'; exact ⟨x, h', rfl⟩
    · rintro ⟨y, hy, eq⟩; rwa [Subtype.eq eq] at hy
  rw [iff_val, h, ←iff_val]

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  have aux : ∀ {Y1 Y2 : Set A}, val_image A Y1 = val_image A Y2 → Y1 ⊆ Y2 := by
    intro Y1 Y2 h' y hy
    have : y.val ∈ val_image A Y1 := ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
    rw [h'] at this
    cases this with | intro y' hy' =>
      cases hy' with | intro h1 h2 =>
        rw [←Subtype.eq h2]
        exact h1
  apply Iff.intro (aux h) (aux h.symm)

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply set_ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply set_ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply set_ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor <;> intro hx
  · have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    cases this with | intro y hy =>
      rwa [Subtype.eq hy.2] at hy.1
  · have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by rw [h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    cases this with | intro y hy =>
      rwa [Subtype.eq hy.2] at hy.1

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    cases this with | intro x' h' =>
      cases h' with | intro hx' heq =>
        rw [←Subtype.eq heq.symm]; exact hx'
  · intro hx
    have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by rw [h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    cases this with | intro x' h' =>
      cases h' with | intro hx' heq =>
        rw [←Subtype.eq heq.symm]; exact hx'

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply set_ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
    intro X1 X2 h
    apply Set.ext; intro x
    apply Iff.intro
    · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
    · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor <;> intro hx
  · have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rw [h] at this
    cases this with | intro y hy =>
      rw [← Subtype.ext hy.2]; exact hy.1
  · have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rw [← h] at this
    cases this with | intro y hy =>
      rw [← Subtype.ext hy.2]; exact hy.1

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  funext x
  apply propext
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  suffices ∀ X Y, val_image A X = val_image A Y → x ∈ X → x ∈ Y by
    exact ⟨this X1 X2 h, this X2 X1 h.symm⟩
  intro X Y hXY hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A Y := hXY ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  match this with
  | ⟨x', hx', e⟩ =>
    rw [Subtype.eq e] at hx'
    exact hx'

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  have H : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 ↔ x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [h]
  dsimp [val_image] at H
  constructor <;> intro hx
  · exact H.mp ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ |>.elim fun y ⟨hy, eq⟩ => Subtype.ext eq ▸ hy
  · exact H.mpr ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ |>.elim fun y ⟨hy, eq⟩ => Subtype.ext eq ▸ hy

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor <;> intro hx
  · have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rcases this with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
    rwa [←Subtype.eq heq]
  · have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := h.symm ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rcases this with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
    rwa [←Subtype.eq heq]

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro hx
    have h' : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rw [h] at h'
    cases h' with | intro x' hx' =>
      cases hx' with | intro hx' heq =>
        rw [←Subtype.eq heq]; exact hx'
  · intro hx
    have h' : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rw [←h] at h'
    cases h' with | intro x' hx' =>
      cases hx' with | intro hx' heq =>
        rw [←Subtype.eq heq]; exact hx'

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  apply Iff.intro
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    exact subset_of_val_image_eq h hx
  · intro hx
    exact subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm hx

by
  intro X1 X2 h; apply Set.ext; intro x
  suffices ∀ Y1 Y2, val_image A Y1 = val_image A Y2 → x ∈ Y1 → x ∈ Y2 by
    exact ⟨this X1 X2 h, this X2 X1 h.symm⟩
  intro Y1 Y2 heq hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A Y2 := by rw [← heq]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  cases this with | intro x' h' =>
  cases h' with | intro hx' e =>
  rw [← Subtype.eq e]; exact hx'

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rw [h] at this
    cases this with | intro x' h' =>
    cases h' with | intro hx' heq =>
    rw [Subtype.eq heq.symm]
    exact hx'
  · intro hx
    have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    rw [←h] at this
    cases this with | intro x' h' =>
    cases h' with | intro hx' heq =>
    rw [Subtype.eq heq.symm]
    exact hx'

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  have h_iff : ∀ X, x ∈ X ↔ x.val ∈ val_image A X := fun X ↦
    ⟨fun hx ↦ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, fun ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ ↦ by rw [← Subtype.eq heq]; exact hx'⟩
  rw [h_iff X1, h_iff X2, h]

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  have sub : ∀ {Y1 Y2 : Set A}, val_image A Y1 = val_image A Y2 → Y1 ⊆ Y2 := by
    intro Y1 Y2 heq y hy
    have h_im : y.val ∈ val_image A Y1 := ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
    rw [heq] at h_im
    cases h_im with
    | intro y' h' =>
      cases h' with
      | intro hy' he =>
        rw [←Subtype.eq he]
        exact hy'
  constructor
  · apply sub h
  · apply sub h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h; apply Set.ext; intro x
  constructor <;> intro hx
  · have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    obtain ⟨x', h', e⟩ := this
    rwa [←Subtype.eq e]
  · have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by rw [h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    obtain ⟨x', h', e⟩ := this
    rwa [←Subtype.eq e]

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · apply subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm
